approach: extend the plugin build capability (packages/universal-plugin/.agents/spec/plugin/build/) with a build-time pin-resolution step: build detects npx <cli>@<version> references in the plugin's source skills, resolves each package's version from a registry (default npmjs, --registry override), and rewrites the pins in place -- same-major by default (--allow-major crosses), --range exact|tilde|caret (default exact/pin), --package filter, --skip-pins opt-out, --dry-run reports without writing; best-effort/offline-safe (registry failure warns+skips, build still exits 0); AXI-conformant output (TOON pins rows + pinned N aggregate, --format json pins array, truncation + --full)

placement/attach decided with user: universal-plugin not cyberplace (version-pin resolution is more universal than the marketplace-interaction CLI); a step INSIDE plugin build not an init-time one-shot or a standalone verb (build already derives from the canonical manifest -- it now also resolves the shared-CLI pins); same-major bound by default. The original report-vs---apply idea maps onto build's existing write-by-default + --dry-run (no --apply flag)

all-additive to the frozen build.feature -> self-clears, stays @frozen, NO re-open (no existing scenario narrowed or rewritten). Single-node blast radius (plugin/build/) but adds a network dependency + rewrites source SKILL.md. auto-spec: self-assert the spec gate within leash after cold judge PASS; bring the impl gate result (built src/pin + pnpm verify) to the user. No narrowing -> Clearance floor not engaged; Conflict/Compatibility still stop.

why: additive extension of the frozen plugin build capability with a build-time pin-resolution step: build detects npx <cli>@<version> references in the plugin's own skills, resolves each package to the newest version within the current pin's major from the registry (default npmjs, --registry override; --allow-major crosses; placeholder pins -> absolute latest), and rewrites the pins in place -- --range exact|tilde|caret (default exact; ~/^ aliased), --package filter (repeatable), --skip-pins opt-out, --dry-run reports without writing; best-effort/offline-safe (unreachable registry OR unresolvable package warns+skips that package, build still exits 0); AXI output (TOON pins rows package/current/resolved/status + pinned N aggregate, --format json pins array, truncation + --full, pinned 0 empty state). cold sdd-spec-judge 3-lens {oracle,builder,architect} ALIGNED true: round 1 Builder FAIL on three coverage gaps (unresolvable-package failure path distinct from unreachable-registry; --range ~/^ alias spellings untested; --package repeatable/compose untested) + Architect FAIL (root spec.md placement map didn't authorize a skill-pin-resolution op -> capability/placement maps disagreed) -> all fixed (added unresolvable-package + no-in-major scenarios, ~/^ Examples rows, --package compose scenario, placement-map bullet) -> re-graded ALIGNED true. check-suite / check-spec-state / check-spec-structure (0/0) / concept-index (no drift) all clean, 0 open markers. all-additive: no pre-existing frozen scenario narrowed -> build.feature stays @frozen, no re-open. root status stays approved.
